title: mimosa standleyi
intro: Mimosa standleyi, also known as the sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a perennial plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its compound leaves that fold up when touched. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. Mimosa standleyi can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits including reduced stress, improved digestion, and relief from fever and respiratory issues.
